steps.title: Identify the causal connection
steps.content: The first sentence establishes a need: the rise in demand for regional cheeses created the need to verify authenticity claims. The second sentence must show what followed. The key signal is this cause-and-effect structure — one situation prompted a response.

steps.title: Match the transition to the logic
steps.content: ”For this reason” directly shows that the EU's establishment of DOP status was a response to verify those authenticity claims. By contrast, in other words, and nevertheless all misrepresent this causal flow. That matches choice B — B is correct.
